full_text:
Xi Zhong 習忠
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xi Zhong (習忠)was born in Xiangyang commandery. Son of Xi Zhen, famous like his father. Xi Zhong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
